fields.summary: Login fails with an incorrect password
fields.description: Logging in with the demo user's email but a wrong password shows an error and keeps the user on the login page (negative test).

step.raw: Open the app and go to the login page.
step.rendered: Open the app and go to the login page.

step.raw: Enter the demo user's email with an incorrect password and submit the login form.
step.rendered: Enter the demo user's email with an incorrect password and submit the login form.

result.raw: An 'Invalid email or password.' error is shown and the page stays on the login form; the user is not logged in.
result.rendered: An 'Invalid email or password.' error is shown and the page stays on the login form; the user is not logged in.
